creator: jason@aventia.pw
text:
(In reply to Vsevolod Stakhov from comment #20)
>It seems you have installed fmtlib that pollutes your build system. Please either remove it and check or, even better, use some appropriate tool for building packages (e.g. poudriere).

Hi there,

Thanks for the interest in this longstanding bug effecting the community!

>It seems you have installed fmtlib that pollutes your build system. Please either remove it and check or...

I don't have fmtlib, nor could I find it on freshports, or maybe it was a typo I am unsure...

As you are the maintainer for the port, please add a make config option for debugging so I can continue to seamlessly update my system using portsnap and portmaster.  

Thanks in advance, and thank you for your contributions to FreeBSD
Regards,
Jason
